feed.title: Subject: Eltoo / LN-Symmetry on Inquisition Signet: BIP 118 + 3-Round State Chain (APO+CTV)

entry.title: Subject: Eltoo / LN-Symmetry on Inquisition Signet: BIP 118 + 3-Round State Chain (APO+CTV)
entry.summary:
In a recent update shared on the Bitcoin Development Mailing List, Sergio Demian Lerner announced significant enhancements to the ln-symmetry branch of CLN (Covenant Language Node). This revival was largely facilitated by leveraging large language models (LLMs) to streamline the process. Detailed information about these updates and examples can be found on the dedicated project recap page [here](https://delvingbitcoin.org/t/ln-symmetry-project-recap/359/17).
Sergio also introduced an innovative approach by integrating APO (Another Protocol Overlay) and developing a new variant which combines CSFS (Consensus Fault Safety System), TH (Transaction Handling), and IK (Identity Keying). This new variant serves as a potential alternative to CTV (CheckTemplateVerify), offering similar functionalities. However, it's important to note that this variant cannot be directly tested on signet until OP_TEMPLATEHASH is activated, indicating a limitation in immediate applicability but paving the way for future implementations once the required conditions are met.
